content: For 2024-2025 state-of-the-art active learning agents, curiosity-driven intrinsic reward signals can be re-framed as an implicit uncertainty ranking for memory sample selection, creating a closed-loop memory system where the agent’s innate drive to explore automatically prioritizes storing the most informative, uncertain experiences for future learning. This eliminates the need for separate hand-engineered uncertainty scoring modules for memory pruning and selection.
source_topics: Uncertainty-based memory sample selection for deep active agents
